---
title: "Making Quarto OERs Reusable"
format: html
---

Best practice includes:

-   modular design using child documents;

-   separating long code into chunks of script;

-   maintaining a clear folder structure;

-   providing editable image assets;

-   avoiding vendor lock-in by using open tools.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Referencing.html)
